page_description: Our classic menu is the best of what we have to offer, and is fit for any occasion.
page_disclaimer: Add 22% production fee and applicable sales tax to all menus. Every event is subject to a $7 per person site fee.

groups.title: Breakfast &  Brunch
groups.description:
All Packages Include 
5 Hour Event Time, Two Hour Access Window Prior to Event Start, Customized Room Setup, Choice of White, Black or Ivory Linens for all Tables, Selection of Napkin Color(s), All China, Glassware & Flatware, Complimentary Parking for all Guests, and Uniformed, Professional Staff.
